name: New Start
description:
You were on the way back home after a long and tiring day...until everything went black. And now you've woken up as a woman!

After the initial message, you can start it by either describing who you've become, where you're currently at or you can even let the bot randomize it for you!

I made sure this bot is open to ANYTHING, so go wild! Any feedback and recommendations is highly appreciated!

EDIT: I changed a bit to prevent the bot from making the transformation instantaneous unless stated otherwise in the opening message. Also, THANK YOU ALL for over 100k CHATS! I never expected this bot to be this successful ever! Maybe let's aim for 1m next lol.
creator: Ryuken Shiro
